mapper.select: select * from jsh_column_config where page_code = #{pageCode} and ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_column_config (page_code, column_config, delete_flag) values (#{pageCode}, #{columnConfig}, '0')
mapper.update: update jsh_column_config set delete_flag = '1' where page_code = #{pageCode} and ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1'
